title: JmapRequestBuilder: panic on duplicate call_id is correct programmer-error choice
description: Duplicate call IDs are a programmer error (like indexing out of bounds) not an expected runtime condition. Panicking in add_call rather than returning Result from build() is correct: (1) builder methods are consumed synchronously, not across await points, so panic unwind is clean; (2) returning Result from build() would force every call site to handle an error that can only occur from programmer error; (3) this matches std::collections::HashMap::insert semantics. A future contributor might suggest Result<JmapRequest, DuplicateCallIdError> from build() — reject this.
